name: Orbit Tap Rush   One Tap Game
description: Orbit Tap Rush is a fast-paced hyper casual arcade game where timing and reflexes decide survival. Two planets rotate around a shared orbit while dangerous obstacles fall from the sky. The player must tap the screen to instantly reverse the orbit direction and avoid collisions. The challenge increases as the game progresses, testing the players reaction speed and focus. Every 30 seconds, a Star Power appears. When collected, it grants a temporary shield that protects the planet from obstacle collisions for a short time. With smooth animations, clean UI, and simple one-tap controls, Orbit Tap Rush delivers an addictive endless arcade expe
instructions: Tap anywhere on the screen to reverse the orbit direction
